ddls:
CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "item" TEXT /* The item being specified */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the specification */,
  "minimum" TEXT /* Minimum value of the specification */,
  "typical" TEXT /* Typical value of the specification */,
  "maximum" TEXT /* Maximum value of the specification */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the units table */,
  "spec_type" TEXT /* Type of specification (e.g., performance, reliability) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the flash memory product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the product was released */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of flash memory product (e.g., SLC, MLC, TLC) */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the flash memory product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the flash memory product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_specs" (
  "product_spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between product and specification */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification */,
  "value" TEXT /* Actual value of the specification for the product */,
  "specification_date" TEXT /* Date the specification was set for the product */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_specs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_specs_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES specifications ("spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., time, frequency, length) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_text" TEXT /* Text describing the condition or note */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., warning, note, requirement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spec_conditions" (
  "spec_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between specification and condition */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spec_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spec_conditions_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES specifications ("spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spec_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specification */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spec_history_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES specifications ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spec_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spec_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES product_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was performed */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., compliance, security) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, QA, product manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Foreign key referencing the units table
